app.title: Group Pay
app.subtitle: Split the bill. No math at the table.

bill.title: > BILL_TOTAL
bill.hint: Enter the full amount on the receipt.

items.title: > ORDER_LOG
items.hint: Add what this person ordered, then tap ADD ITEM before continuing.

summary.title: > RECONCILE
summary.tapNameToEdit: Tap name to edit · tap amount to see items

errors.pendingItem: You have an item typed — tap ADD ITEM first
errors.noItemsForPayer: {name} needs at least one item with a price above $0
errors.shareFailed: Could not share — try Copy Link instead

toasts.linkCopied: Link copied — bookmark to save session

steps.title: ② Confirm / Back
steps.description: CONFIRM moves forward. BACK appears on later steps if you need to fix something.

steps.title: ③ Who ate?
steps.description: Comma-separated names. Everyone sharing the bill.

steps.title: ④ Current person
steps.description: One diner at a time. Their running total is on the right.

steps.title: ⑤ Add items
steps.description: Name + price, then tap ADD ITEM. Do not skip ADD ITEM or you'll lose the entry.

steps.title: ⑥ Split shared food
steps.description: Check who shares. Enter the FULL price — we split it automatically.

steps.title: ⑦ Reconcile
steps.description: Totals must match the bill. Green = good. Amber = review items.

steps.title: ⑧ Copy link
steps.description: Short compressed link with your session. Includes ?lang= if not English.

steps.title: ⑨ PDF
steps.description: Full itemized PDF with split tags and session QR.

steps.title: Language
steps.description: EN / ES. Saved in the URL as ?lang=es for shareable Spanish links.

steps.title: This guide
steps.description: Shows tips for the screen you're on — never runs automatically.

steps.title: Go back
steps.description: BACK lets you fix the bill total, names, or previous people's items.

steps.title: Added items
steps.description: Items listed here are saved. Remove with × if needed.

steps.title: Next / Finish
steps.description: Requires at least one item per person. Won't advance if ADD ITEM was skipped.

steps.title: Verify breakdown
steps.description: Expand each person to see every item. Tap their name to go back and edit.

steps.title: Share
steps.description: Native share sheet on mobile — sends the short link and PDF together.

steps.title: Show QR
steps.description: Display a scannable QR code for this session — great at the table.
